name: formatNumber
description: Locale-aware number formatting. Formats a numeric value using the browser's Intl.NumberFormat API, supporting dynamic values bound to the data model.

path.description: A JSON pointer path into the data model to resolve the number value dynamically.

value.description: The numeric value to format. Can be a literal number or a DynamicNumber referencing a data model path.

locale.description: A BCP 47 language tag (e.g., 'en-US', 'de-DE'). If omitted, the browser's default locale is used.
